title: Fampahafantarana
body: Faly mandray anao izahay. Efa complet daholo ny lesona 1 à 13 ka mazotoa mianatra☺️🙏.

title: Filazana
body: Hiangaviana ianao mba hanaparitaka araka izay azo atao ny application satria mbola maro ireo zatovo mila izany. Afaka manaparitaka ity rohy ity ianao na mamindra azy mivantana: https://zatovo-miaradia-aminjesosy.github.io/Zatovo-mianatra-im-pito/Page/
